waiting_event: 等待 NEXTDC 在 Infrastructure & Facilities 环节的 AI 数据中心需求，继续转化为收入加速、订单/backlog 或利润率韧性。
lambda_evidence: 被纳入 NVIDIA DSX AI Factory 图谱的 Infrastructure & Facilities 环节，说明其业务与 AI Factory 供给链存在直接相关性。
Yahoo Finance 最新快照：收入 YoY 12.8%，毛利率 66.8%，隐含上行 24.6%。
近期 Yahoo 新闻锚点：Australia's NEXTDC secures $1.3 billion senior debt to fund data center expansion

evidence_notes.customer_adoption: DSX 图谱将其归入 Infrastructure & Facilities，作为 AI Factory 产业链采用信号；仍需用客户订单或管理层指引继续交叉验证。
evidence_notes.revenue_accelerating: Yahoo 财务锚点 revenue_accelerating_hint=None，当前收入 YoY=12.8。
evidence_notes.margin_intact: Yahoo 财务锚点 margin_intact_hint=None，当前毛利率=66.78。
evidence_notes.backlog_growing: 批量脚本未读取公司订单/backlog 原文，暂按未确认处理；后续应以财报、RPO、订单或产能指引验证。
evidence_notes.industry_tailwind: AI Factory 资本开支、数据中心电力/散热/计算系统需求构成行业顺风；该图谱本身是行业链条确认。

falsifiers.thesis_wrong: AI 数据中心相关收入、订单或客户采用未能在后续财报中体现，且管理层下修相关需求预期。
falsifiers.state_transition_failed: 连续两个复盘周期没有新增订单、收入加速、毛利率改善或客户扩张信号。
falsifiers.capital_stagnation: λ 下降且同一期间其他 AI Factory 标的出现更密集、更可验证的证据网络。

reason: λ 判断为上升，依据是 DSX 产业链位置与 Yahoo 财务/估值锚点的交叉验证；订单/backlog 仍需后续证据补强。
review_clock: 下次财报发布后，或出现大客户订单、数据中心 capex 指引、毛利率明显恶化/改善时复盘。

_data_snapshot.freshness_note: Price is Yahoo Finance's latest available quote and may be delayed by the exchange. Fundamentals are based on Yahoo Finance's latest reported period.

recent_news.title: Australia's NEXTDC secures $1.3 billion senior debt to fund data center expansion
recent_news.summary: Australian data center operator NEXTDC (NXT.AX) said on Tuesday it ‌has secured A$1.8 billion ($1.29 billion) in ‌new senior debt facilities to support capital expenditure ​required for recent customer contract wins and ongoing data center developments. The move follows a sweeping A$1.5 billion entitlement offer and ‌an additional commitment ⁠of A$700 million by Canada's La Caisse last month. Upon ⁠financial close, NEXTDC's total available senior debt facilities will increase from A$6.4 billion to ​A$8.2 billion.
